sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics
special_mechanics.description: Racing game featuring Porsche 928 with vehicle-based movement. Game involves high-speed pursuits with acceleration and collision mechanics against criminal vehicles.

physics_values.ramming_mechanic: Multiple ramming required to stop criminal vehicle

special_mechanics.name: Road Perspective
special_mechanics.description: First-person perspective gameplay with technical advancements in hill and track presentation. Road splits at certain points requiring correct turns.

tier_notes: T2 (empirical/qualitative) - Racing game with vehicle-based physics rather than character movement. No detailed physics parameters documented in available sources. Game focuses on vehicular pursuit mechanics with criminal AI and time-based gameplay. SNES version is first-person perspective unlike other ports.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Chase H.Q. (SNES)
